title: SCIP Detect Output
description: Universal project detection schema for scip-* tools. Describes the project topology of a repository.

path.description: Path relative to the repository root. '.' for the root project itself.

buildFiles.description: Build manifest and config files found for this project, relative to the project's path. Always includes package.json; also includes tsconfig.json or jsconfig.json when present.

languages.description: Detected languages of this project's source files. Empty array means no source files were found.

buildTool.description: Build tool or package manager (npm, pnpm, yarn, gradle, maven, cargo, pip, etc.).

config.description: Build/compiler configuration detected for this project. Null or absent if none found.

dependencies.description: Names of sibling or cousin ProjectNodes that this project depends on.

subProjects.description: Child projects (workspace packages, Gradle subprojects, etc.).

includedBuilds.description: Paths to other project roots included as composite/included builds (Gradle). Absent or empty for tools that don't support this.

configFile.description: Path to the config file, relative to this ProjectNode's path.

ProjectConfig.description: Tool-specific configuration. Always has configFile; additional properties vary by tool (e.g. allowJs for TypeScript, sourceCompatibility for Gradle).
